creator: me@enriquefynn.com
text:
If I use option (1), I'm restricted in space to describe each option, I tried a bunch of things, but I cannot have something like:

[X] Binary Utilities
    abigen(8): ...
    rtldump(8): ...
    ...

I think if it is not possible to do the above, I can just name the option Developer Tools and assume developers know how to use the tools that they wish to install.
